modmenu.descriptionTranslate.modmenu: A simple and opinionated Minecraft radial menu.
screen.radial.editor.title: Edit Radial Slot
screen.radial.editor.name: Slot Name
screen.radial.config.title: Radial Configuration
screen.radial.config.description.main: Radial by velolib - A simple and opinionated Minecraft radial menu.
screen.radial.config.description.left_cl: Left-click a slot in-game to trigger its action.
screen.radial.config.description.right_c: Right-click a slot in-game to edit its properties.
screen.radial.config.show_preview.toolti: Renders a live, interactive preview of your radial menu.
screen.radial.config.slot_count.tooltip: The number of selectable slices in the root radial menu.
screen.radial.config.radius.tooltip: The distance from the center of the screen to the item slots.
screen.radial.config.inner_padding.toolt: How close to the center the cursor can be before it stops selecting a slot.
screen.radial.config.outer_reach.tooltip: How far outward the cursor can travel before it stops selecting a slot.
screen.radial.config.background_color.to: The default color of the unselected menu sectors.
screen.radial.config.activation_color.to: The color a sector flashes when actively hovered or selected.
screen.radial.config.show_activation_zon: Renders the visual background ring and highlight colors behind the item slots.
screen.radial.config.sector_gap.tooltip: The visual spacing between each slice. This is purely cosmetic and does not affect the clickable hitbox area.
screen.radial.config.activation_mode.too:
How actions are triggered.

Click: Requires actively clicking the mouse.
Release: Triggers automatically when letting go of the menu hotkey.

§e(Note: Submenus will always require a click to open)§r
screen.radial.config.animation_speed.too: The length of the opening scale animation. Set to 0 to open instantly.
